hooks.name: Pre-Write Test Check
hooks.description: Before writing any file, check the test_results table for recent failures. If failures exist, warn the user and suggest fixing them first before new work.

action.prompt: Before proceeding with this write, check for failing tests: run 'cd /Users/rajeevnaik/Code/xConvert.com/scrabblewordsfinder && npx wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "SELECT test_name, status, error_message, file_changed FROM test_results WHERE status = 'fail' ORDER BY run_at DESC LIMIT 5;" --json'. If there are failures, warn the user: 'There are failing tests that should be fixed first' and list them. If no failures, proceed with the write.
